parts.name: Part 1
parts.instructions: You must answer this question. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: Read this email from your English-speaking friend Lucy and the notes you have made.

stimulus.head: EMAIL
stimulus.body:
From: Lucy
Subject: Your town festival

Hi!

I saw some photos of the festival in your town last year — it looked amazing! I'd love to come this year.

When exactly is it, and what happens there? Also, what's the best thing to eat at the festival?

Write soon!
Lucy

bullets: tell Lucy when the festival is
describe what happens at the festival
invite Lucy to stay at your house

parts.name: Part 2
parts.instructions: Answer one of these questions. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: You see this announcement in your school English-language magazine.

stimulus.title: A CELEBRATION TO REMEMBER
stimulus.body: Which celebration or special day do you enjoy most every year? Write an article describing it and explaining why it is important to you. The best articles will be published next month.

bullets: what you and your family or friends do
why it is important to you

tasks.lead: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.
tasks.startSentence: The music in the town square suddenly stopped, and everyone looked up.

stimulus.body:
Your story must begin with this sentence:

The music in the town square suddenly stopped, and everyone looked up.
